rationale.R1.4: The artifact mentions prior work on calibration in code generation and uncertainty in program induction but doesn't explicitly compare to them or articulate a clear delta.
rationale.R1.7: There are no citations provided in the text.
rationale.RX.1: The artifact discusses uncertainty by stating that CalibSynth provides a confidence score for each candidate program.
rationale.RX.3: The artifact mentions evaluating on a held-out subset of HumanEval-style problems, suggesting it mostly covers the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: No mention of potential harm or regressions is made in the text.
rationale.RX.5: There is no discussion of provenance or traceability for the generated code.
